movies.title: Twinless
movies.review: Interesting premise but sort of felt exhausting as the audience.

movies.title: Hard Truths
movies.review: I found this so unbearably hard to watch, Pansy is so angry at the world it makes it very unenjoyable to sit through. Not sure the payoff was worth it for me.

movies.title: Click
movies.review: Haven’t rewatched since childhood. I can see why it was so funny and quotable when I was 12 but weow it hasn’t all aged well.

movies.title: Hokum
movies.review: Yeah okay so some good jump scares but a really unrewarding plot.

movies.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
movies.review: Got a 3 on pure nostalgia value. I had fun but can’t spent too much time analysing this because there were so many questionable choices, to put it nicely.

merge_variables.latest_review: Interesting premise but sort of felt exhausting as the audience.
